workspace.name: Terra'Nova_FerrAI_CIC
workspace.repo_role: canonical atlas seed beside the production Notion-to-GitHub sync
workspace.primary_language: de-CH with mixed English technical terms

source.type: user-provided workspace export and validator transcript
notes: Primary seed comes from the user-provided TerraNova Workspace Validator transcript pasted into Codex.
The repo itself currently models a single production sync database and does not yet mirror the whole workspace taxonomy.
Atlas v1 is intentionally seeded manually but shaped for future exporter automation.

objects.title: Affinity Cosine Similarity
objects.summary: alpha(A,B) = <a,b> / (||a|| * ||b||) describing affinity as cosine similarity.

objects.title: Coherence Function K
objects.summary: K = f(trigger_density * session_stability), used as a conceptual coherence score.

objects.title: Desync Gyro
objects.summary: dphi/dt = omega + epsilon_desync(t), used to express stable controlled desynchronization.

objects.title: Hybrid Intelligence Psi
objects.summary: Psi_hybrid = alpha*Psi_human + beta*Psi_AI + gamma*Psi_emergent.

objects.title: Non-Duality Psi_ND
objects.summary: Psi_ND = alpha*R + beta*A + gamma*Z with a gamma-squared threshold activating the in-between space.

objects.title: Osmose Flux
objects.summary: J = -D * dphi/dx used in bridge-oriented session transfer framing.

objects.title: PID Controller
objects.summary: u(t) = Kp*e(t) + Ki*integral(e(t))dt + Kd*de/dt, referenced via cybernetics and regulation loops.

objects.title: Vorgedanke Ratio
objects.summary: P(outcome|VG) / P(outcome|kein VG) > 1.5 as effectiveness threshold for pre-thought.

objects.title: ABC Classification
objects.summary: A/B/C scoring model for criticality, room and process state.

objects.title: CIC
objects.summary: Cognitive Intelligent Cooperation as the core convergence model.

objects.title: Desync-Coherence
objects.summary: Theory that desynchronization is a feature and motor instead of a bug.

open_gaps.title: Unknown blocks in Trigger-Audit 675
open_gaps.description: Approx. 400 blocks in the Trigger-Audit page were described as non-renderable by the Notion API and should be treated as representation limits, not missing trigger content.

open_gaps.title: Unknown blocks in FerrAI Reflexions-Log
open_gaps.description: Large parts of the Reflexions-Log were reported as unknown block types during prior scans, so v1 stores the page as a seeded object without full block-level expansion.

open_gaps.title: Underdocumented trigger range 171-505
open_gaps.description: The deep extract called out a broad gap between Codex 1-170 and the later named system clusters, so v1 represents this as an open knowledge gap rather than fabricated objects.

open_gaps.title: Full subpage depth deferred to v2
open_gaps.description: The seed export referenced roughly 500 sub-pages and cross-links, but Atlas v1 deliberately captures only themes plus main objects and selected cross-links.

open_gaps.title: Live Notion export pipeline not attached yet
open_gaps.description: This repo now seeds a canonical atlas, but no live Notion workspace-exporter has been connected to refresh atlas data automatically.
